title: Rich Polish Flaxseed Crumble
description: A luscious, crumbly vegan dessert that blends earthy flaxseed with sweet poppy seeds and a buttery crumb, inspired by classic Polish pastries.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 180°C (350°F) and line a 23x23cm baking dish with parchment paper.
In a large bowl, mix together rolled oats, ground flaxseed, poppy seeds, almond flour, coconut sugar, and a pinch of sea salt.
Warm the coconut oil and applesauce together in a small saucepan over low heat until the oil is fully melted and the mixture is smooth.
Stir in the vanilla extract to the wet mixture.
Pour the wet mixture over the dry ingredients, stirring until all components are evenly coated; the mixture should be slightly moist but not sticky.
Transfer the crumb mixture to the prepared baking dish and press it down firmly with a spatula to create an even layer.
Bake for 20–25 minutes or until the edges turn golden brown and the center is set.
Allow the crumble to cool for about 10 minutes before cutting into squares; serve warm or at room temperature.
